title: oenothera watsonii
intro: Oenothera watsonii, also known as the evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Onagraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oenothera watsonii include relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting skin health. Oenothera watsonii is often prepared as a supplement or herbal tea, with oil extracted from its seeds being used in skincare products due to its moisturizing and antioxidant properties.
